meta_title: Private STI Testing in Preston | Confidential Same-Day Results
meta_description: Discreet, same-day STI testing and treatment in Fulwood, Preston. Completely confidential. No referral needed. Dr Faizal Secretary. Consultation £119.
hero_h1: Confidential STI Testing & Sexual Health in Preston
hero_sub: Discreet, same-day STI testing and treatment in Fulwood, Preston. Results handled with complete confidentiality. No judgement. No fuss.
intro_quote: You want to get tested. You want it done quickly, privately, and without a fuss.
intro_heading: Sexual Health Appointments in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: Sexual health is personal. At My Private Clinic, all sexual health consultations are handled with complete discretion. Nothing is shared without your consent.
intro_para_2: STI testing, treatment, sexual health concerns and contraception advice — all in a private, non-judgemental environment with Dr Faizal Secretary.

faqs.question: What STIs do you test for?
faqs.answer: We can test for chlamydia, gonorrhoea, syphilis, HIV, hepatitis B and C, and more — tailored to your history and risk factors.

faqs.question: Are results kept confidential?
faqs.answer: Completely. Results are never shared with anyone — including your NHS GP — without your explicit consent.

faqs.question: How much does sexual health testing cost?
faqs.answer: The consultation is £119 for a 30-minute appointment. The cost of specific tests is quoted separately depending on what panels are required.

faqs.question: Do I need to have symptoms to book?
faqs.answer: No. Many people book for peace of mind, after a new partner, or for routine screening. No symptoms required.
